name: CLX - MGA Insurance Application Builder v1

nodes.name: Webhook
nodes.notes: DEACTIVATED. Internal-call (INTERNAL_EMAIL_SECRET). Triggered after the client selects a policy_recommendation. Aggregates KYC + suitability + disclosures + recommendation (all WHERE vertical_id='insurance'), asks Claude to auto-complete a carrier application template, persists to policy_applications. Phase 5 MVP uses a generic application schema (Phase 6 swaps to per-carrier templates). Returns application_id for advisor review.

parameters._note: client_id resolved from suitability assessment in next step; this is a placeholder query to satisfy parallel-branch shape. Actual KYC lookup happens in Aggregate node which uses the suitability's client_id. Phase 5b cleans this up by serializing the lookups.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ (() => { const ins = $input.item.json; const row = Array.isArray(ins) ? ins[0] : ins; return JSON.stringify({ vertical_id: 'insurance', event_type: 'application_built', client_id: $('Build Insert').item.json.client_id, advisor_id: $('Build Insert').item.json.advisor_id, policy_application_id: row && row.id, performed_by_user_id: null, performed_by_role: 'agent', event_data: { application_id: row && row.id, fields_requiring_human_input_count: ($('Build Insert').item.json.insert_row.fields_requiring_human_input || []).length }, occurred_at: new Date().toISOString() }); })() }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ (() => { const ins = $('Insert Application').item.json; const row = Array.isArray(ins) ? ins[0] : ins; return JSON.stringify({ ok: true, vertical_id: 'insurance', application_id: row && row.id, fields_requiring_human_input: $('Build Insert').item.json.insert_row.fields_requiring_human_input }); })() }}
